title: lagocodes patula
intro: Lagocodes patula, also known as the lagocodes or lagodea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Lagocodes patula often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
